'''Amamanam''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[B'das]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented the B'das people c. [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. He was a member of the Senate's [[Council on Security and Intelligence]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
